negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_037
prompt: The video opens with a close-up shot of a person engaged in a crafting activity at a wooden table. The individual, wearing a gray apron over a maroon top, is focused on cutting a piece of vibrant green fabric with orange-handled scissors. Their hands, painted with dark nail polish, are steady as they guide the scissors along the edge of the fabric, which is folded in half. The table surface is cluttered with various cut-out shapes in pink and white, hinting at an ongoing project. The background features a gray cutting mat and a blurred potted plant, adding context to the setting, suggesting a cozy, well-lit indoor space dedicated to crafting. As the video progresses, the person continues to cut the fabric, making precise adjustments to their grip and angle of the scissors to ensure clean cuts. The final frame captures the person still actively engaged in the cutting process, with the fabric gradually being trimmed down, while the surrounding workspace remains unchanged.
